items.name: Drop Chain Necklace
items.description:
The Leukemia & Lymphoma Society (LLS) mission is to cure leukemia, lymphoma, and myeloma, and improve the quality of life of patients and their families. LLS funds lifesaving research around the world, provides free information and support services and is a voice for patients seeking access to quality, affordable, coordinated care. Because kids are different and need to be treated differently, LLS started the Dare to Dream Project. Its mission is to help kids not only survive but thrive beyond their disease. We’re excited about the impact it will have on our youngest patients as we: 

• fund groundbreaking research and the first-ever global pediatric leukemia master clinical trial 
• grow our LLS education and support services for patients and their families, and 
• ramp up advocacy efforts, fighting for legislation that will help every kid get accessible, affordable, quality healthcare.
